subtitles: {"de":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:06.333000000","text":"An jenem Tag wurde die gesamte Menschheit"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:06.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.500000000","text":"zu Stein."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:11.958000000","text":"Hör mir zu, Senkū! Ich hab mich entschieden!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.250000000","text":"Ich werde Yuzuriha hier und heute meine fünf Jahre lang gehegten Gefühle gestehen!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.083000000","text":"Ach ja? Das ist ja mal interessant, richtig spannend."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:26.709000000","text":"Ich werd dich anfeuern, dass meine Stimmbänder reißen, hier vom Chemieraum aus."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:26.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.834000000","text":"Das tust du? Danke, Senkū!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:34.000000000","text":"Jetzt nerv nicht rum. Ich werd dich kein Stück anfeuern, Riesenkerl."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:34.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.916000000","text":"Was? Was nun?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:40.667000000","text":"Wie dämlich kann man nur sein, fünf Jahre lang nichts zu sagen? Widerspricht jeglicher Vernunft."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:40.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:43.417000000","text":"Aber nun geb ich dir was sehr Vernünftiges."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.417000000","text":"Eine Medizin, die die Pheromone nur so strömen lässt – anders gesagt, ein Liebestrank."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:53.041000000","text":"Trink den und deine Erfolgschance steigt auf 10 Milliarden Prozent."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:01.583000000","text":"Danke, Senkū. Aber ich muss ablehnen. Ich darf mich nicht auf so einen Schwindel verlassen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:06.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:10.542000000","text":"Echt jetzt, Senkū? Ein Liebestrank?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:10.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:12.916000000","text":"Als ob’s so was geben würde."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:13.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:14.417000000","text":"Ist bloß Benzin."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:14.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:17.625000000","text":"Hab’s aus ’nem Flaschendeckel raffiniert."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:17.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:20.958000000","text":"Denk doch mal an die Struktur der Polyethylen-Moleküle, du Trottel."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:21.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:24.667000000","text":"Die ist wie beim Benzin, nur dass der Kohlenwasserstoff der Länge nach zerhackt wurde."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:24.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:26.166000000","text":"Sieh nur, dann verstehst du’s."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:26.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:27.291000000","text":"Nix versteh ich."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:27.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:28.417000000","text":"Kein Stück."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:28.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:32.333000000","text":"Heißt das nicht, Taiju würde sterben, wenn er das trinkt?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:34.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:37.000000000","text":"Ich war mir zu 10 Milliarden Prozent sicher, dass er ablehnt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:37.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:40.083000000","text":"So gewissenhaft, wie der Trottel ist."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:44.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:47.875000000","text":"Yuzuriha! Entschuldige, dass ich dich warten ließ."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:49.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:53.250000000","text":"Was gibt’s denn, Taiju? Worüber wolltest du reden?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:55.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:57.458000000","text":"100 Yen auf ’ne Abfuhr."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:57.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:59.458000000","text":"300 Yen, dass sie heftig ausfällt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:59.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:02.041000000","text":"500 Yen auf die Abfuhr des Jahrhunderts."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:02.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:04.916000000","text":"10.000 Yen, dass sie unerwartet nicht nein sagt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:05.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:06.125000000","text":"Dein Ernst?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:07.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:12.875000000","text":"Ich hatte Angst, dass unsere Freundschaft zerbricht, wenn ich Yuzuriha meine Gefühle gestehe."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:12.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:16.667000000","text":"Ich … war so ein Feigling."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:16.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:18.709000000","text":"Hör mir zu, Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:19.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:21.208000000","text":"Aber heute sag ich’s ihr!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:21.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:24.542000000","text":"Fünf Jahre lang habe ich …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:29.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:32.458000000","text":"Was ist das … für ein Licht?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:46.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:48.916000000","text":"Yuzuriha, halt dich an dem Kampferbaum fest!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:49.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:51.250000000","text":"Ich versteh’s nicht, aber …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:53.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:54.875000000","text":"Was ist los? Es ist stockfinster!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:54.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:56.500000000","text":"– Kann mich nicht bewegen … – Irgendwer …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:56.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:58.709000000","text":"- What’s happening? - Help!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:21.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:25.125000000","text":"Hilfe, Mama, Papa!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:26.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:31.834000000","text":"Ich … sterbe … sonst noch …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:49.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:51.375000000","text":"Ich bin nicht tot!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:51.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:55.333000000","text":"Wenn ich nur eine Sekunde abgelenkt bin, saugt es mich ein. Komm schon, wach auf!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:55.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:59.333000000","text":"Yuzuriha geht es sicher gut. Sie wird unversehrt sein."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:59.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:04.583000000","text":"Ich darf nicht als Feigling sterben! Nächstes Mal sage ich’s ihr!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:12.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:15.750000000","text":"Ich werde überleben! Mit bloßer Willenskraft!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:15.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:18.959000000","text":"Wie viele Wochen und Monate es auch dauern mag …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:19.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:23.834000000","text":"Ich werde es ihr sagen, das schwöre ich!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:26.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:31.000000000","text":"Wie viele Jahrzehnte, Jahrhunderte, Jahrtausende sind seitdem vergangen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:31.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:33.333000000","text":"Nein, ich darf nicht aufgeben."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:34.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:37.041000000","text":"Ich muss es Yuzuriha sagen!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:37.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:39.583000000","text":"Ich werd ums Verrecken nicht sterben!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:32.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:36.333000000","text":"Ich bin ausgebrochen! Endlich bin ich ausgebrochen!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:39.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:41.500000000","text":"Ein Steinstück?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:51.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:55.375000000","text":"Jetzt verstehe ich. Es hat sie also …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:55.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:57.291000000","text":"alle erwischt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:58.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:02.250000000","text":"Wie viel Zeit ist nur vergangen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:03.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:04.959000000","text":"Vergib mir."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:05.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:08.625000000","text":"Mehr kann ich im Moment nicht tun."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:11.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:15.959000000","text":"Wenn sich die Landschaft nicht stark verändert hat, brauche ich bloß dem Fluss folgen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:16.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:18.959000000","text":"Dann komme ich zum Kampferbaum."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:22.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:24.250000000","text":"Huch? Da ist was runtergefallen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:24.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:26.709000000","text":"Eine steinerne … Vogelstatue?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:26.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:30.333000000","text":"Wer hat die nur gemacht? Sieh dir mal die Details an!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:30.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:31.834000000","text":"Wie ein echter Vogel!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:32.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:34.000000000","text":"Ist das kein echter?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:34.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:38.500000000","text":"Hab auf Fotos von Freunden gesehen, dass die auch woanders gefunden wurden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:38.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:40.291000000","text":"Armes Ding …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:40.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:44.917000000","text":"Ist das eine Vogelkrankheit, bei der sich die Haut verhärtet?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:50.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:52.875000000","text":"ÖFFNUNGSZEITEN: WERKTAGS: 10:00 - 19:00 UHR SA, SO, FEIERTAGE: 10:30 - 19:30 UHR"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:54.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:58.208000000","text":"Der Tierarzt wird wohl kaum vor Schulbeginn schon offen haben."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:58.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:00.041000000","text":"Du denkst auch echt nicht nach, hm?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:00.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:01.500000000","text":"Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:01.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:03.834000000","text":"Und mal ehrlich, du willst diese Skulptur,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:03.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:07.083000000","text":"die nie im Leben ein echter Vogel sein kann, zum Tierarzt bringen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:07.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:09.792000000","text":"Wie dumm kann man sein? Schämst du dich nicht?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:13.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:18.542000000","text":"Jetzt stolper ich gerade über Yuzuriha, von der ich in dieser dämlichen Lage am wenigsten erwischt werden wollte …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:18.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:20.875000000","text":"Moment mal … „Stolpere“?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:20.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:24.208000000","text":"Und hier steht noch jemand."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:24.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:26.916000000","text":"Ein Mädchen, das sich schämen sollte, nicht nachzudenken."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:27.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:28.041000000","text":"Wer hätt’s gedacht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:32.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:35.083000000","text":"Jetzt lach doch nicht, Mensch. Du bist doch in derselben Lage."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:35.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:37.333000000","text":"Wir schaffen’s nie rechtzeitig zum Unterricht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:37.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:39.583000000","text":"Ja, das stimmt allerdings."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:47.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:49.125000000","text":"Yuzuriha …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:54.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:58.291000000","text":"Ich weiß, sie ist es. Auch nach all den Jahrtausenden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:59.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:03.375000000","text":"Sie lebt. Die ganze Zeit …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:03.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:05.000000000","text":"hat sie gelebt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:18.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:21.500000000","text":"Du hast gut durchgehalten! Und du auch, Kampferbaum!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:21.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:26.250000000","text":"Du hast sie all die Zeit vor der Zerstörung bewahrt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:28.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:29.792000000","text":"Verzeih mir."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:30.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:31.958000000","text":"Ich konnte dich nicht beschützen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:32.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:36.667000000","text":"Nein … Im Gegenteil, du hast mich beschützt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:37.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:41.875000000","text":"Weil du da warst, konnte ich bis heute überleben."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:42.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:45.250000000","text":"Ganz allein der Verzweiflung und Finsternis ausgeliefert …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:45.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:49.166000000","text":"habe ich hunderte, tausende von Jahren …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:50.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:53.000000000","text":"Gut, endlich kann ich’s dir sagen!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:53.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:57.000000000","text":"Hör mir zu, Yuzuriha! Was ich damals sagen wollte …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:57.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:00.083000000","text":"Was ich dir vor langer, langer Zeit …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:01.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:03.500000000","text":"an jenem Tag sagen wollte …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:17.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:19.417000000","text":"Ich habe dich geliebt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:20.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:24.166000000","text":"All die hunderte, tausende von Jahren."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:46.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:50.750000000","text":"Ich werde dich retten, Yuzuriha! Noch habe ich keine Ahnung wie."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:51.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:53.041000000","text":"Aber ich schwöre es!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:55.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:57.166000000","text":"FLUSSABWÄRTS, RIESENKERL"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:57.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:00.709000000","text":"„Flussabwärts, Riesenkerl“?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:10.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:14.667000000","text":"Endlich bist du aufgewacht, Riesenkerl."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:17.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:19.709000000","text":"Du lebst ja, Senkū!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:19.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:23.750000000","text":"Umarm mich nicht, wenn du nackig bist! Weg von mir!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:26.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:30.458000000","text":"Heute ist der 05. Oktober 5738."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:30.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:33.166000000","text":"Wie kann man nur so sehr verschlafen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:33.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:37.417000000","text":"Seit ich vor ’nem halben Jahr erwacht bin, racker ich mich hier ab."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:37.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:40.125000000","text":"Das heißt also, dass seit damals …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:40.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:43.417000000","text":"Circa 3.700 Jahre sind vergangen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:43.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:47.125000000","text":"Wie kannst du das Datum so genau bestimmen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:48.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:51.750000000","text":"Hab ganz einfach gezählt, wie auch sonst?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:54.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:00.041000000","text":"4, 5, 6, 7, 8 …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:01.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:04.875000000","text":"Verdammt, schon wieder fast das Bewusstsein verloren."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:04.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:08.375000000","text":"800.000 Sekunden sind wohl mein Limit …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:09.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:13.375000000","text":"Wie wenn man Durchfall hat."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:13.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:18.583000000","text":"Gleichzeitig denken und zählen. Das Gehirn zweispurig laufen lassen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:18.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:23.375000000","text":"116.427.065.530 Sekunden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:24.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:31.083000000","text":"1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:31.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:36.583000000","text":"In dieser Stockfinsternis hast du die ganze Zeit …?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:36.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:39.291000000","text":"Selbst wenn ich durch bloße Willenskraft hätte aufwachen können …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:39.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:44.583000000","text":"Wäre ich barfuß im Winter aufgewacht, wäre das Spiel bei der Nahrungssuche aus gewesen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:44.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:47.958000000","text":"Der Frühling begünstigt ein Überleben zweifelsohne mehr."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:48.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:52.083000000","text":"Ich musste also unbedingt die richtige Jahreszeit kennen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:54.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:59.000000000","text":"Wir sind da. Statt auf der faulen Haut zu liegen, wirst du auch mit anpacken."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:59.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:02.083000000","text":"Senkū … Hast du …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:02.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:05.834000000","text":"das von null an …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:10.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:12.166000000","text":"Mir mangelt’s an Arbeitern."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:12.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:15.750000000","text":"Allein kostet es mich schon den ganzen Tag, die Grundlagen zum Überleben zu schaffen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:16.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:20.917000000","text":"Um die Zivilisation weiter voranzutreiben, sind Muskelberge unabdingbar."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:21.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:24.625000000","text":"Ich habe die ganze Zeit auf dich gewartet, Taiju."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:24.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:27.875000000","text":"Ich war mir zu 10 Milliarden Prozent sicher, du würdest überleben."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:28.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:32.458000000","text":"Ein Kerl wie du, der beschlossen hatte, sich Yuzuriha zu offenbaren,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:32.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:35.750000000","text":"gibt wohl kaum nach ein paar Jahrtausenden schon auf."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:36.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:38.667000000","text":"So einer bist du nicht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:38.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:42.500000000","text":"Ja. Natürlich nicht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:46.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:50.041000000","text":"Die Denkarbeit, Senkū, überlasse ich dir."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:51.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:54.375000000","text":"Die körperliche Arbeit übernehme ich!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:56.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:01.208000000","text":"Zwei Millionen Jahre brauchte die Menschheit von der Steinzeit zur Gegenwart."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:01.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:03.792000000","text":"Ich will im Nu dahinkommen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:04.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:07.166000000","text":"Holen wir uns die Welt zurück."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:07.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:11.291000000","text":"Ich werde das Prinzip hinter der Versteinerung und das Gegenmittel wissenschaftlich ergründen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:11.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:14.250000000","text":"Und ich Yuzuriha retten!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:15.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:19.959000000","text":"Wir zwei Oberschul-Knilche erschaffen die Zivilisation von null an neu."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:20.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:25.750000000","text":"Wir werden zu Adam und Eva dieser Steinwelt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:26.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:28.417000000","text":"Jetzt fängt der Spaß erst an."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:37.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:39.583000000","text":"Allein die Menge haut mich um."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:40.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:43.291000000","text":"Welcher Cheat hat dir so viel Ausdauer gegeben, du Sack?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:45.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:48.916000000","text":"Knollenblätterpilz: giftig. Bunashimeji: essbar."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:49.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:50.709000000","text":"Fliegenpilz: giftig."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:50.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:53.834000000","text":"Dass der nicht geht, sieht man doch. Könnte glatt aus Mario kommen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:53.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:54.750000000","text":"Weiter im Programm."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:54.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:56.250000000","text":"Beifuß: essbar."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:56.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:59.083000000","text":"Eisenhut … Willst du wen umbringen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:02.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:04.958000000","text":"Köstlich! Womit hast du das gewürzt?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:05.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:07.542000000","text":"Mit schnödem Salz aus Meereswasser."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:07.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:10.583000000","text":"Mit etwas Salz können Menschen die meisten Dinge essen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:10.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:13.250000000","text":"Auch zur Konservierung ist Salz unerlässlich."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:13.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:15.959000000","text":"Die wichtigste Entdeckung der Höhlenmenschen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:16.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:19.041000000","text":"Danke, Senkū! Du weißt echt alles!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:19.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:21.041000000","text":"Was mir an Hirnschmalz fehlt,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:21.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:23.417000000","text":"gleich ich durch Fleiß und Muskelkraft aus!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:26.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:29.125000000","text":"Ich sammle drüben weiter!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:29.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:31.834000000","text":"Oh, wilde Früchte."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:31.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:34.000000000","text":"Ob man die essen kann?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:34.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:37.166000000","text":"Probieren geht über Studieren."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:44.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:46.583000000","text":"Den kenn ich doch aus dem Fernsehen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:46.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:51.458000000","text":"Das ist doch Shishiō Tsukasa, der „stärkste Oberschul-Primat aller Zeiten“."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:52.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:54.417000000","text":"Selbst ihn hat’s erwischt …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:02.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:03.667000000","text":"Das ist doch …!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:05.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:08.542000000","text":"Es hat also noch wer außer mir und Senkū überlebt!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:09.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:10.333000000","text":"Wer hat das dort gelassen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:10.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:11.458000000","text":"Ich, du Pfeife."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:11.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:13.417000000","text":"Du warst das?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:15.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:19.208000000","text":"Gibt es auf der Welt wirklich keine anderen Menschen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:19.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:22.916000000","text":"Die Zahl der Menschen erhöhen … Das ist unsere oberste Priorität."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:23.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:27.875000000","text":"Wenn wir zwei Männchen nur feuchtfröhlich in den Tag hineinleben, hat die Menschheit keine Zukunft."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:27.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:29.166000000","text":"Da hast du recht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:29.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:32.875000000","text":"Es sind 3.700 Jahre vergangen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:32.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:35.500000000","text":"Wieso hat sich nun unsere Versteinerung gelöst?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:35.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:37.291000000","text":"Durch Verwitterung des Gesteins?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:37.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:41.083000000","text":"Ja, aber nehmen wir an, dieses mysteriöse Gestein hat sich aufgelöst …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:42.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:45.667000000","text":"Findest du’s nicht seltsam, dass wir fast zeitgleich erwacht sind?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:45.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:48.583000000","text":"Ein halbes Jahr Unterschied bei 3.700 Jahren."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:48.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:52.291000000","text":"Für jeden Zufall gibt es einen logischen Grund."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:52.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:56.667000000","text":"Wir wurden beide in die Nähe dieser Höhle gespült."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:57.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:59.750000000","text":"Sieh mal, was da runtertropft."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:01.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:04.500000000","text":"Ein wahres Wunderwasser, geboren aus Fledermauskot."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:04.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:06.166000000","text":"Salpetersäure."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:06.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:08.417000000","text":"Was?! Salpetersäure?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:08.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:10.625000000","text":"Was soll das sein?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:10.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:12.500000000","text":"Die Reaktion hab ich erwartet, Riesenkerl."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:12.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:14.959000000","text":"Hab aber keine Lust, es auch nur grob zu erklären."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:16.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:21.792000000","text":"Das heißt, wenn wir diese Dingsbumbssäure draufgießen, verwittert der Stein und löst sich?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:21.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:24.959000000","text":"Wenn’s doch bloß so einfach wäre …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:32.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:34.750000000","text":"Ich hab schon wie ein Irrer rumprobiert"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:34.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:37.375000000","text":"und alles Erdenkliche ausgetestet."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:39.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:42.208000000","text":"Etliche Dutzende …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:42.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:45.125000000","text":"So was passiert doch nur in Fantasy-Geschichten."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:45.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:48.041000000","text":"Ist es ein Mineral? Oder eher Zellen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:48.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:50.958000000","text":"Uns fehlt die Ausrüstung, um nachzuforschen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:51.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:53.500000000","text":"Du meinst, in dieser Welt gibt es Dinge,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:53.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:55.834000000","text":"die auch die Wissenschaft nicht erklären kann?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:57.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:00.125000000","text":"Auf diesen dummen Spruch hab ich gewartet."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:00.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:03.583000000","text":"Deshalb stellt man immer wieder Hypothesen auf und testet sie."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:04.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:06.166000000","text":"Wissenschaft ist ganz simpel."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:06.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:08.917000000","text":"Wenn wir doch nur Sake hätten …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:10.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:14.125000000","text":"ETHANOL, SALPETERSÄURE – Mit dem Alkohol im Sake hätten wir Salpetersäure und Ethanol"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:14.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:16.125000000","text":"ÄTZMITTEL, NITAL – und könnten Nital herstellen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:16.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:18.792000000","text":"Wird in diversen Industrien als Ätzmittel benutzt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:19.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:21.458000000","text":"Was hast du gerade gesagt, Senkū?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:22.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:23.750000000","text":"Ich sprach von Nital."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:23.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:25.417000000","text":"Das dringt in die Korngrenze des Ferrit …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:25.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:28.542000000","text":"Das mein ich nicht. Den komplizierten Kram kapier ich nicht,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:28.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:31.125000000","text":"aber du sagst, wir brauchen Alkohol?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:31.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:35.834000000","text":"Trauben sind doch die Basis für Wein, oder?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:37.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:40.083000000","text":"Wer sagt’s denn, Riesenkerl?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:50.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:54.375000000","text":"Die Körperarbeit überlass ich komplett dir. Das ergibt den meisten Sinn."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:57.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:59.834000000","text":"Weinherstellung ist denkbar einfach."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:59.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:02.625000000","text":"Trauben oder Rosinen zerstampfen, in einen Behälter geben …"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:02.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:06.041000000","text":"und jeden Tag gut durchrühren – das war’s."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:07.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:11.500000000","text":"In unserer Zeit war Schwarzbrennerei allerdings illegal."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:13.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:17.208000000","text":"3 Wochen … Sollte langsam fertig sein."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:17.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:20.959000000","text":"Aber Senkū, wir sind doch noch minderjährig."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:21.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:26.250000000","text":"Keine Sorge, schließlich sind 3.700 Jahre vergangen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:26.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:28.333000000","text":"Stimmt ja!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:35.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:37.333000000","text":"Gar nicht so übel wie gedacht."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:37.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:40.291000000","text":"Aber 10 Milliarden mal ekliger als das Zeugs auf dem Markt."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:40.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:43.667000000","text":"Mit Trauben kann man echt so leicht Wein machen?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:43.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:46.250000000","text":"Schritt für Schritt vorwärts."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:46.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:50.208000000","text":"Von nun an wird’s allerdings etwas müßiger."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:50.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:54.834000000","text":"„Wein destillieren für Anfänger: Mein erster Brandy“."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:54.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:57.667000000","text":"Destillieren? Null Peil, was das ist."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:57.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:18:59.792000000","text":"Dacht ich mir schon."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:18:59.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:19:02.083000000","text":"Erhitzen, abkühlen, tropfen lassen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:19:02.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:19:03.875000000","text":"So konzentriert man Alkohol."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:19:04.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:19:07.291000000","text":"Schon 3.000 Jahre vor Christus"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:19:07.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:19:10.916000000","text":"haben die Mesopotamier in Tontöpfen destilliert."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:19:11.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:19:15.000000000","text":"Nichts ist unschaffbar! Der Spaß fängt erst an!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:03.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:06.125000000","text":"Lass es mich dir erklären, Riesenkerl."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:06.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:09.792000000","text":"Auch die Wissenschaft kann nicht alle Fragen klären?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:09.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:10.875000000","text":"Pah."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:13.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:16.375000000","text":"Versteht man was nicht, sucht man nach Regeln."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:16.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:21.542000000","text":"Dieser stumpfen Fleißarbeit hat man den Namen „Wissenschaft“ gegeben."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:52.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:55.333000000","text":"Ein Jahr seit Beginn der Experimente."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:55.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:21:58.000000000","text":"Ging ja schneller als erwartet."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:21:59.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:22:01.792000000","text":"Es ist ganz einfach."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:22:02.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:22:06.250000000","text":"Mit Wissenschaft habe ich gegen die Fantasie gewonnen."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:22:10.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:22:13.041000000","text":"Jetzt fängt der Spaß erst an."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:23:52.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:23:54.875000000","text":"NÄCHSTES MAL:"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:23:54.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:24:00.083000000","text":"DIESES WERK IST FIKTION, DOCH BASIEREN DIE METHODEN AUF DER REALITÄT. SIE SIND ABER UNTER UMSTÄNDEN SEHR GEFÄHRLICH ODER GESETZESWIDRIG."}],"en":[{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:01.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:08.958000000","text":"That day, everyone in the world turned to stone."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:09.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:10.667000000","text":"Listen up, Senku!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:10.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.083000000","text":"I've made up my mind."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:12.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.375000000","text":"I'm going to confess the feelings I've had for Yuzuriha for the past five years!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:17.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:18.667000000","text":"Yeah?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:18.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.208000000","text":"Well, that sure does sound interesting."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:22.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.875000000","text":"I'll be cheering for you so hard that my vocal will cords snap."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:24.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:26.792000000","text":"From here in this science lab."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:26.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.375000000","text":"You will?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:28.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:29.916000000","text":"Thanks, Senku!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:30.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:34.000000000","text":"Shut up. I'm not cheering one millimeter for you, you big oaf."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:34.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:35.916000000","text":"What?! Make up your mind!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:36.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.375000000","text":"And you haven't said anything for five years?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:38.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:40.834000000","text":"How illogical can you be, idiot?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:40.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.208000000","text":"I've got something for you that's logical as hell."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:44.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.125000000","text":"A drug that'll stimulate your pheromone output to the max."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:47.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.583000000","text":"A love potion, if you will."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:49.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:00:52.917000000","text":"Take this, and you're set, ten billion percent."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:00:56.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:00.000000000","text":"Thanks, Senku, but sorry."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:00.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:02.500000000","text":"I can't rely on cheap tricks."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:07.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:08.583000000","text":"Seriously, Senku?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:08.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:10.709000000","text":"A love potion?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:10.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:13.125000000","text":"Like those even exist."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:13.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:14.834000000","text":"It's just gasoline."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:14.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:17.834000000","text":"I refined it from plastic bottle caps."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:17.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:21.041000000","text":"Think about the molecular structure of polyethylene, moron."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:21.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:24.625000000","text":"It's just a long gasoline molecule with a few hydrocarbons chopped off."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:24.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:26.250000000","text":"You can tell by looking at it."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:26.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:27.250000000","text":"Uh, no, I can't."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:27.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:28.542000000","text":"No way."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:28.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:32.917000000","text":"So... wouldn't Taiju-kun have died if he drank it?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:34.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:37.333000000","text":"I was ten billion percent sure he wouldn't drink it."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:37.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:40.041000000","text":"Not that strait-laced idiot."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:45.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:46.500000000","text":"Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:46.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:48.250000000","text":"Sorry to keep you waiting."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:49.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:51.875000000","text":"So, what's up, Taiju-kun?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:51.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:53.709000000","text":"What did you want to tell me?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:55.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:57.458000000","text":"A hundred yen says he gets rejected."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:57.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:01:59.417000000","text":"Three hundred yen says he gets rejected hard."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:01:59.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:02.208000000","text":"Five hundred yen says he gets rejected at full power."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:02.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:04.916000000","text":"Ten thousand yen says he actually doesn't."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:05.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:06.375000000","text":"Seriously?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:07.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:11.458000000","text":"I was afraid that by telling her how I feel,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:11.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:13.291000000","text":"she wouldn't even be my friend anymore."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:13.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:16.709000000","text":"I've been a coward all this time."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:16.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:19.208000000","text":"Hear me out, Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:19.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:21.583000000","text":"But today's the day."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:21.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:24.709000000","text":"For the past five years, I've..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:29.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:32.375000000","text":"What's that light?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:46.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:47.208000000","text":"Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:47.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:49.125000000","text":"Hang on to that camphor tree!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:49.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:51.583000000","text":"I don't know, but..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:53.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:55.125000000","text":"What's going on? It's so dark."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:55.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:56.542000000","text":"I can't speak... Someone help!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:02:56.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:02:59.000000000","text":"--What's happening?! --Help... Help!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:21.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:25.792000000","text":"Help me... Mom, Dad..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:27.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:32.458000000","text":"Am I... going... to die?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:49.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:51.458000000","text":"I'm not dead!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:51.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:54.041000000","text":"I have to stay focused, or it'll suck me in."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:54.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:55.709000000","text":"Wake up, damn it!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:55.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:57.542000000","text":"Yuzuriha will be all right."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:03:57.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:03:59.958000000","text":"I'm sure she's safe."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:00.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:02.125000000","text":"I can't go down a coward."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:02.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:05.208000000","text":"I'm going to confess to Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:12.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:15.875000000","text":"I'm going to survive by willpower alone!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:15.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:19.583000000","text":"Whether it's for weeks or months..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:19.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:23.458000000","text":"I'll tell her, no matter what!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:26.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:28.291000000","text":"How many decades has it been?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:28.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:29.333000000","text":"Centuries?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:29.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:30.958000000","text":"Millennia?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:31.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:34.041000000","text":"Well, I'm not giving up."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:34.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:37.250000000","text":"I'm gonna tell Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:04:37.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:04:39.625000000","text":"I'll survive, even if it kills me!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:32.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:33.375000000","text":"I broke out!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:33.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:35.542000000","text":"I broke free! Finally!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:39.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:41.917000000","text":"Stone fragments?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:51.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:52.834000000","text":"I see."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:52.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:05:58.375000000","text":"So it did happen to everyone."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:05:58.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:02.625000000","text":"Just how much time has gone by?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:04.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:05.834000000","text":"I'm sorry."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:05.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:09.166000000","text":"This is all I can do for you right now."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:11.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:13.792000000","text":"As long as the terrain hasn't changed too much,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:13.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:16.625000000","text":"I should be able to follow the river back."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:16.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:19.000000000","text":"Back to that camphor tree..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:22.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:24.291000000","text":"Hey, something fell down."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:24.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:26.709000000","text":"A stone carving of a bird?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:26.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:30.375000000","text":"Whoever made this is amazing. Look at the detail on the wings."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:30.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:32.000000000","text":"It looks so real."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:32.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:33.916000000","text":"Maybe it is real."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:34.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:36.166000000","text":"My friend said he saw one like that somewhere else."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:36.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:38.583000000","text":"He posted a photo of it."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:38.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:40.291000000","text":"Poor thing..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:40.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:45.208000000","text":"It might be, like, a bird disease that makes its skin harden."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:50.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:52.834000000","text":"WEEKDAYS WEEKENDS, HOLIDAYS"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:52.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:54.417000000","text":"ANIMAL ADVOCACY WEEK HOURS OF OPERATION"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:54.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:06:58.250000000","text":"No vet's office is going to be open before school hours even start."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:06:58.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:00.458000000","text":"You never think things through, do you?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:00.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:01.709000000","text":"Yuzuriha!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:01.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:05.375000000","text":"Besides, there's no way that carving could be a real bird."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:05.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:07.250000000","text":"And you brought it to a vet?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:07.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:08.458000000","text":"You're so silly."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:08.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:10.333000000","text":"I'm embarrassed for you."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:13.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:16.291000000","text":"Of all the people to just happen to run into me"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:16.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:18.792000000","text":"when I'm in the middle of being a dolt..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:18.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:21.083000000","text":"Wait... Run into me?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:21.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:27.125000000","text":"Yup, and here's another embarrassing kid who didn't think things through."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:27.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:28.500000000","text":"Imagine that!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:30.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:31.916000000","text":"SHUEI ANIMAL HOSPITAL"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:32.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:33.792000000","text":"Come on, stop laughing."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:33.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:35.000000000","text":"You did the same thing."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:35.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:37.417000000","text":"We're gonna be late for school now."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:38.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:39.792000000","text":"Yeah, you're right!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:47.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:49.125000000","text":"Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:54.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:56.500000000","text":"I'd never mistake you."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:56.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:07:58.500000000","text":"Even after thousands of years."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:07:59.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:05.125000000","text":"You've been alive all this time."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:18.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:20.125000000","text":"Good job staying alive!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:20.208000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:22.000000000","text":"Well done, camphor tree!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:22.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:26.834000000","text":"This whole time, you kept Yuzuriha from washing away and breaking apart!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:28.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:32.083000000","text":"I'm sorry I couldn't protect you."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:32.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:37.583000000","text":"Actually, you were the one who was protecting me, Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:37.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:42.375000000","text":"It's because of you that I was able to stay alive all this time,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:42.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:45.458000000","text":"alone in that hopeless darkness,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:45.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:50.333000000","text":"for hundreds of years... thousands of years..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:50.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:53.166000000","text":"All right, I can finally say it."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:53.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:08:57.333000000","text":"Let me finish saying what I was about to say that day."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:08:57.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:03.792000000","text":"The rest of what I was saying on that day so long ago..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:18.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:20.166000000","text":"I've loved you..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:20.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:22.709000000","text":"...for hundreds of years..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:22.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:24.667000000","text":"...thousands of years..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:46.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:48.667000000","text":"I'm going to save you, Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:48.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:09:53.333000000","text":"I have no idea how yet, but I will--"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:09:57.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:01.917000000","text":""Follow the river downstream, big oaf.""},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:10.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:14.875000000","text":"So you're finally awake, you big oaf."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:17.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:19.709000000","text":"You're alive, Senku?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:19.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:22.834000000","text":"Don't hug me while you're buck naked!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:22.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:24.375000000","text":"I'll kill you!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:26.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:30.625000000","text":"Today is October 5th, 5738."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:30.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:33.500000000","text":"You slept in for a hell of a long time."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:33.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:37.542000000","text":"I've been up and working for over six months already."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:37.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:40.041000000","text":"So it's been..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:40.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:43.542000000","text":"A good 3,700 years."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:43.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:47.625000000","text":"How can you tell exactly what day it is?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:48.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:50.000000000","text":"I just counted."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:50.083000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:10:52.166000000","text":"How else would I know?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:10:54.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:00.375000000","text":"Four, five, six, seven, eight..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:01.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:04.916000000","text":"Damn, I almost lost consciousness again."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:05.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:09.583000000","text":"I peak every 800,000 seconds or so."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:09.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:13.709000000","text":"I guess it's like when you have diarrhea."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:13.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:16.083000000","text":"Think and count at the same time."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:16.166000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:18.750000000","text":"Use your brain in parallel."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:18.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:23.916000000","text":"116,427,065,530 seconds."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:24.000000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:28.333000000","text":"One, two, three, four,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:28.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:31.667000000","text":"five, six, seven..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:31.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:34.458000000","text":"In that darkness?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:34.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:36.667000000","text":"The entire time?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:36.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:39.542000000","text":"Even if I could have awakened by sheer willpower,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:39.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:41.750000000","text":"if I'd woken up naked in the winter,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:41.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:44.750000000","text":"trying to find food would have been an instant game over."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:44.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:48.166000000","text":"Starting in the spring is a must for survival."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:48.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:52.417000000","text":"An accurate account of the time was information that I absolutely needed."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:54.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:55.958000000","text":"All right, we're here."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:56.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:11:59.250000000","text":"Time to stop blabbering and get to work."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:11:59.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:02.583000000","text":"Senku, did you..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:02.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:06.041000000","text":"Did you build this from scratch?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:10.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:12.208000000","text":"I don't have enough manpower."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:12.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:16.250000000","text":"Just producing the bare minimum to keep myself alive takes all day."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:16.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:21.417000000","text":"In order to rebuild civilization, I need a big, muscle-bound meathead."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:21.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:24.709000000","text":"I've been waiting for you this whole time, Taiju."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:24.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:28.250000000","text":"I was ten billion percent certain that you were alive."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:28.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:32.583000000","text":"There's no way a guy who was so intent on confessing to Yuzuriha"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:32.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:36.166000000","text":"would give in after just a few thousand years."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:36.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:38.875000000","text":"You aren't that weak."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:38.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:40.625000000","text":"Yeah."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:40.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:42.125000000","text":"Of course I'm not."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:46.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:50.333000000","text":"I'm counting on you to do all the brainy stuff, Senku."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:51.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:12:54.583000000","text":"You can count on me to do the heavy lifting!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:12:56.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:01.375000000","text":"Humanity spent two million years getting from the stone age to the modern age."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:01.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:04.792000000","text":"We're going to sprint all the way back to the top."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:04.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:07.417000000","text":"I'm going to take the world back."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:07.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:11.709000000","text":"And I'll figure out the science behind the petrification and our revival."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:11.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:15.041000000","text":"I'm going to save Yuzuriha."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:15.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:20.834000000","text":"The two of us high school brats are going to build a civilization out of nothing."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:20.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:25.875000000","text":"We're going to become the Adam and Eve of this stone world."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:25.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:28.875000000","text":"This is exhilarating."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:37.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:40.041000000","text":"At least it's a huge haul, I guess."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:40.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:43.667000000","text":"What kind of cheat gave you that stamina?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:46.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:47.500000000","text":"Amanita virosa: poisonous."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:47.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:49.041000000","text":"Buna shimeji: edible."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:49.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:50.875000000","text":"Amanita muscaria: poisonous."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:50.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:53.875000000","text":"You can't tell this one's bad? It looks like it's right out of Mario."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:53.959000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:54.834000000","text":"Next."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:54.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:56.333000000","text":"Mugwort: edible."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:56.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:57.667000000","text":"Monkshood."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:13:57.750000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:13:59.500000000","text":"Who is there to kill, you moron?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:02.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:03.208000000","text":"Yum!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:14:03.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:14:05.000000000","text":"How true."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:29.458000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:35.625000000","text":"Besides, why exactly were we freed from our petrification after 3,700 this weird mineral was corroded,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:42.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:45.792000000","text":"isn't it suspicious that the two of us got out at almost the same time?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:45.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:48.792000000","text":"Only six months apart after 3,700 years."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:48.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:52.542000000","text":"There's a logical explanation behind every coincidence."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:52.625000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:15:57.041000000","text":"You and I both washed up near this cave."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:15:57.125000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:00.333000000","text":"Look at that stuff dripping from up Nitric acid?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:08.542000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:10.625000000","text":"What's that?!"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:10.709000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:12.500000000","text":"I knew you'd say that, you big oaf."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:12.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:15.417000000","text":"I'm not gonna waste time even explaining the gist of it."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:16.834000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:21.792000000","text":"So you're saying this something-or-other acid corrodes the stone and revives them?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:21.875000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:25.208000000","text":"If only it were so simple."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:32.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:37.834000000","text":"I've been trying like a madman, using every method available to me."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:39.667000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:42.417000000","text":"So many times... So many dozens of times..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:42.500000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:45.250000000","text":"This is all in the realm of fantasy."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:45.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:48.166000000","text":"Is it mineral? Is it cellular?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:48.250000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:51.250000000","text":"I don't even have the equipment to find out anymore."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:51.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:16:56.041000000","text":"So there are things in this world that even science can't explain?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:16:57.792000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:00.208000000","text":"Here we go again with that tired cliché."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:00.291000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:03.958000000","text":"That's why you hypothesize and experiment over and over."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:04.041000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:06.834000000","text":"Science is a slow process."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:06.917000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:09.375000000","text":"If only I had liquor, though..."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:10.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:12.333000000","text":"With the alcohol in liquor,"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:12.417000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:16.291000000","text":"I could combine the nitric acid and ethanol to make nital."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:16.375000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:19.250000000","text":"It's literally an industrial-strength etching agent."},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:19.333000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:21.500000000","text":"What did you just say, Senku?"},{"startTime":"+00000000.00:17:21.583000000","endTime":"+00000000.00:17:23.834000000","text":"Huh?
